bundled.name: Web Search
bundled.description: Search the web via Brave Search API

keys.label: Brave Search API Key
keys.urlLabel: Get a free key at brave.com/search/api →

bundled.name: Weather
bundled.description: Current conditions and forecasts via Open-Meteo (no key required)

bundled.name: Calendar & Tasks
bundled.description: Read and create Google Calendar events and Tasks

bundled.name: Email
bundled.description: Search sent mail, compose and send (with your approval)

bundled.name: Memory & Contacts
bundled.description: Search your knowledge graph of people, companies, and projects

bundled.name: Morning Briefing
bundled.description: Daily digest of calendar, tasks, open actions, and news

optional.name: Metro North Trains
optional.description: Live MTA train schedules and track assignments at Grand Central

optional.name: Web Search
optional.description: Real-time web search with AI summaries. Uses Tavily for AI-enhanced results; falls back to Brave Search.
optional.scope_summary: Searches the live web using Tavily and/or Brave. Queries and URLs leave your device.

keys.label: Brave Search API Key
keys.urlLabel: Get a free key at api.search.brave.com →

optional.name: Web Scrape
optional.description: Full-page web scraping and content extraction. Retrieves and cleans complete article text, blog posts, and documentation from any URL.
optional.scope_summary: Fetches full page content from URLs via Firecrawl. Only URLs leave your device.

optional.name: Google Search
optional.description: Google-quality search via SerpApi. Returns structured results including knowledge graph, answer boxes, shopping, news, and YouTube results.
optional.scope_summary: Google-quality structured search via SerpApi. Search queries leave your device.

optional.name: Browser Automation
optional.description: AI browser agent that navigates websites, fills forms, clicks buttons, and extracts data. For complex web tasks requiring interaction.
optional.scope_summary: Controls a browser to interact with websites on your behalf via Skyvern.

optional.name: Slack Search
optional.description: Search Slack messages and channel history

optional.name: GitHub
optional.description: Search repos, issues, PRs, and code across your organizations

optional.name: Linear
optional.description: Query issues, cycles, and project status from Linear

optional.name: Notion
optional.description: Search and read pages from your Notion workspace

optional.name: Spotify
optional.description: Control playback and search your music library
